result:
**Goal: Add an auto-playing "Demo Tour" screensaver mode that cycles through all 23+ simulation modes, displaying each one for a configurable duration with an informational overlay (mode name, brief description, key controls), creating a hands-free showcase of the entire simulator.**

This is strategic because the project has accumulated an impressive 23+ simulation modes, but a new user has no easy way to discover them all. A demo tour transforms the collection from a menu of options into a cinematic experience — automatically initializing each mode with its best preset, running it for ~10 seconds, then smoothly transitioning to the next. It leverages all existing work rather than adding yet another isolated mode, and doubles as a terminal screensaver.

Shall I implement it?
